name: chr3_3q26_2_TERC_SD
description: 3q26.2 region around TERC (telomerase RNA component) and the PIK3CA neighbourhood. Site of recurrent 3q26 amplifications in squamous cell carcinomas, frequently spanning TERC and SOX2; the breakpoints associate with low-copy repeats.

architecture.internal_structure: Small flanking SDs of 10-40 kb at ~93% identity; canonical 3q26 amplicon includes TERC, SOX2, PIK3CA, MECOM.

related_diseases: Squamous cell carcinoma 3q26 amplification (lung, cervix, oesophagus)
